DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AECHELON TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. The Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges consideration and the terms of the oral contract. Plaintiff alleges that the parties entered into the compensation agreement on January 23, 2006, defendant agreed to compensate plaintiff $20,000 annually for his service as a director of defendant, and plaintiff was not paid for the 2011-2012 term. The allegations regarding 2013 relate to how defendant restructured the compensation into two components. Plaintiff does not clearly allege a new agreement. The court reads the Amended Complaint liberally under CCP 452. The court did not consider plaintiff's opposing declaration in rendering its ruling. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT AECHELON TECHNOLOGY, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. First Amended Complaint filed April 7, 2014. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
